put.summary: Create invoice reminder and sends it by the given dispatch type. Supports the reminder types SOFT_REMINDER, REMINDER and NOTICE_OF_DEBT_COLLECTION. DispatchType NETS_PRINT must have type NOTICE_OF_DEBT_COLLECTION. SMS and NETS_PRINT must be activated prior to usage in the API.

parameters.name: dispatchTypes
parameters.description: List of dispatch types (comma separated enum values)

parameters.name: smsNumber
parameters.description: SMS number (must be a valid Norwegian telephone number)

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address to send the reminder to. (Defaults to to the same email list as the invoice if not provided)

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Address to send the reminder to. (Defaults to the customer address if not provided)

parameters.name: postalCode
parameters.description: Postal code to send the reminder to (Defaults to the customer postal code if not provided)

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: City to send the reminder to (Defaults to the customer city if not provided)

put.summary: Create a new relative VAT Type. These are used if the company has 'forholdsmessig fradrag for inngående MVA'.

parameters.name: vatTypeId
parameters.description: VAT type ID. The relative VAT type will behave like this VAT type, except for the basis for calculating the VAT deduction, which is decided by the basis percentage.

parameters.name: percentage
parameters.description: Basis percentage. This percentage will be multiplied with the transaction amount to find the amount that will be the basis for calculating the deduction amount.

get.summary: [BETA] Get the correction voucher for the opening balance.
[BETA] Get the voucher for the opening balance.

post.summary: [BETA] Add an opening balance on the given date.  All movements before this date will be 'zeroed out' in a separate correction voucher. The opening balance must have the first day of a month as the date, and it's also recommended to have the first day of the year as the date. If the postings provided don't balance the voucher, the difference will automatically be posted to a help account

delete.summary: [BETA] Delete the opening balance. The correction voucher will also be deleted

post.summary: [BETA] Create one employee, based on import from external system. Validation is less strict, ie. employee department isn't required.

API endpoint for creating historical vouchers. These are vouchers created outside Tripletex, and should be from closed accounting years. The intended usage is to get access to historical transcations in Tripletex. Also creates postings. All amount fields in postings will be used. VAT postings must be included, these are not generated automatically like they are for normal vouchers in Tripletex. Requires the \"All vouchers\" and \"Advanced Voucher\" permissions.

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Import comment, include the name and version of the source system.

parameters.name: useCustomNumberSeries
parameters.description: Use custom number series (true), or use default number series for historical vouchers (false).

put.summary: [BETA] Deletes all historical vouchers. Requires the "All vouchers" and "Advanced Voucher" permissions.

post.summary: Upload attachment to voucher. If the voucher already has an attachment the content will be appended to the existing attachment as new PDF page(s). Valid document formats are PDF, PNG, JPEG and TIFF. Non PDF formats will be converted to PDF. Send as multipart form.

parameters.name: voucherId
parameters.description: Voucher ID to upload attachment to.

parameters.name: paymentTypeId
parameters.description: Payment type to register prepayment of the invoice. paymentTypeId and paidAmount are optional, but both must be provided if the invoice has already been paid. The payment type must be related to an account with the same currency as the invoice.

parameters.name: paidAmount
parameters.description: Paid amount to register prepayment of the invoice, in invoice currency. paymentTypeId and paidAmount are optional, but both must be provided if the invoice has already been paid. This amount is in the invoice currency.

parameters.name: paidAmountAccountCurrency
parameters.description: Amount paid in payment type currency

parameters.name: paymentTypeIdRestAmount
parameters.description: Payment type of rest amount. It is possible to have two prepaid payments when invoicing. If paymentTypeIdRestAmount > 0, this second payment will be calculated as invoice amount - paidAmount

parameters.name: paidAmountAccountCurrencyRest
parameters.description: Amount rest in payment type currency

Find rate categoriy groups corresponding with sent data.
Get cost category by ID.
Find cost category corresponding with sent data.
Get payment type by ID.
Find payment type corresponding with sent data.
Get travel expense settings of logged in company.
Get travel expense zone by ID.
Find travel expense zones corresponding with sent data.

usesAbroadPayment.description: UsesAbroadPayment field. Determines if we should use domestic or abroad remittance. To be able to use abroad remittance, one has to: 1: have Autopay 2: have valid combination of the fields Iban, Bic (swift) and Country of creditor bank.

userType.description:
Define the employee's user type.
STANDARD: Reduced access. Users with limited system entitlements.
EXTENDED: Users can be given all system entitlements.
NO_ACCESS: User with no log on access.
Users with access to Tripletex must confirm the email address.

isContact.description: Determines if the employee is a contact (external) in the company.

employmentId.description: Existing employment ID used by the current accounting system

noEmploymentRelationship.description: Activate pensions and other benefits with no employment relationship.

isMainEmployer.description:
Determines if company is main employer for the employee. Default value is true.
Some values will be default set if not sent upon creation of employment:
If isMainEmployer is NOT sent and tax deduction code loennFraHovedarbeidsgiver is sent, isMainEmployer will be set to true.
If isMainEmployer is NOT sent and tax deduction code loennFraBiarbeidsgiver is sent, isMainEmployer will be set to false.
If true and deduction code is NOT sent, value of tax deduction code will be set to loennFraHovedarbeidsgiver.
If false and deduction code is NOT sent, value of tax deduction code will be set to loennFraBiarbeidsgiver.
For other types of Tax Deduction Codes, isMainEmployer does not influence anything.

taxDeductionCode.description:
EMPTY - represents that a tax deduction code is not set on the employment. It is illegal to set the field to this value.
Default value of this field is loennFraHovedarbeidsgiver or loennFraBiarbeidsgiver depending on boolean isMainEmployer

isRemoveAccessAtEmploymentEnded.description:
If true, access to the employee will be removed when the employment ends.
This field is part of the Employee object, therefore changing it for one Employment affects all Employments.

workingHoursScheme.description: Define the working hours scheme type. If you enter a value for SHIFT WORK, you must also enter value for shiftDurationHours

isSupplier.description: Defines if the customer is also a supplier.

overdueNoticeEmail.description: The email address of the customer where the noticing emails are sent in case of an overdue

singleCustomerInvoice.description: Enables various orders on one customer invoice.

invoiceSendMethod.description:
Define the invoicing method for the customer.
EMAIL: Send invoices as email.
EHF: Send invoices as EHF.
EFAKTURA: Send invoices as EFAKTURA.
AVTALEGIRO: Send invoices as AVTALEGIRO.
VIPPS: Send invoices through VIPPS.
PAPER: Send invoices as paper invoice.
MANUAL: User will have to send invocie manually.

emailAttachmentType.description:
Define the invoice attachment type for emailing to the customer.
LINK: Send invoice as link in email.
ATTACHMENT: Send invoice as attachment in email.

invoicesDueIn.description: Number of days/months in which invoices created from this customer is due

invoicesDueInType.description: Set the time unit of invoicesDueIn. The special case RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH enables the due date to be fixed to a specific day of the month, in this case the fixed due date will automatically be set as standard on all invoices created from this customer. Note that when RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH is set, the due date will be set to the last day of month if "31" is set in invoicesDueIn.

isFactoring.description: If true; send this customers invoices to factoring (if factoring is turned on in account).

invoiceSMSNotificationNumber.description: Send SMS-notification to this number. Must be a norwegian phone number

isAutomaticSoftReminderEnabled.description: Has automatic soft reminders enabled for this customer.

isAutomaticReminderEnabled.description: Has automatic reminders enabled for this customer.

isAutomaticNoticeOfDebtCollectionEnabled.description: Has automatic notice of debt collection enabled for this customer.

discountPercentage.description: Default discount percentage for this customer.

costExcludingVatCurrency.description: Price purchase (cost) excluding VAT in the product's currency

priceExcludingVatCurrency.description: Price of purchase excluding VAT in the product's currency

priceIncludingVatCurrency.description: Price of purchase including VAT in the product's currency

isDeletable.description: For performance reasons, field is deprecated and it will always return false.

minStockLevel.description: Minimum available stock level for the product. Applicable only to stock items in the Logistics Basics module.

number.description: If NULL, a number is generated automatically.

isOffer.description: If is Project Offer set to true, if is Project set to false. The default value is false.

isFixedPrice.description: Project is fixed price if set to true, hourly rate if set to false.

displayNameFormat.description: Defines project name presentation in overviews.

fixedprice.description: Fixed price amount, in the project's currency.

isPriceCeiling.description: Set to true if an hourly rate project has a price ceiling.

priceCeilingAmount.description: Price ceiling amount, in the project's currency.

projectHourlyRates.description: Project Rate Types tied to the project.

forParticipantsOnly.description: Set to true if only project participants can register information on the project

generalProjectActivitiesPerProjectOnly.description: Set to true if a general project activity must be linked to project to allow time tracking.

invoiceDueDateType.description: Set the time unit of invoiceDueDate. The special case RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH enables the due date to be fixed to a specific day of the month, in this case the fixed due date will automatically be set as standard on all invoices created from this project. Note that when RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH is set, the due date will be set to the last day of month if "31" is set in invoicesDueIn.

invoiceReceiverEmail.description: Set the project's invoice receiver email. Will override the default invoice receiver email of any customer that may also be set in the request body.

overdueNoticeEmail.description: Set the project's overdue notice email. Will override the default overdue notice email of any customer that may also be set in the request body.

invoiceOnAccountVatHigh.description: The on account(a konto) amounts including VAT

accountingDimensionValues.description: [BETA - Requires pilot feature] Free dimensions for the project.

invoiceComment.description: Comment to be displayed in the invoice based on this order. Can be also found in Invoice.invoiceComment on Invoice objects.

invoicesDueIn.description: Number of days/months in which invoices created from this order is due

invoicesDueInType.description: Set the time unit of invoicesDueIn. The special case RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH enables the due date to be fixed to a specific day of the month, in this case the fixed due date will automatically be set as standard on all invoices created from this order. Note that when RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH is set, the due date will be set to the last day of month if "31" is set in invoicesDueIn.

isShowOpenPostsOnInvoices.description: Show account statement - open posts on invoices created from this order

isClosed.description: Denotes if this order is closed. A closed order can no longer be invoiced unless it is opened again.

orderLines.description: Order lines tied to the order. New OrderLines may be embedded here, in some endpoints.

isSubscription.description: If true, the order is a subscription, which enables periodical invoicing of order lines. First, create an order with isSubscription=true, then approve it for subscription invoicing with the :approveSubscriptionInvoice method.

subscriptionDuration.description: Number of months/years the subscription shall run

subscriptionPeriodsOnInvoice.description: Number of periods on each invoice

subscriptionInvoicingTime.description: Number of days/months invoicing in advance/in arrears

isSubscriptionAutoInvoicing.description: Automatic invoicing. Starts when the subscription is approved

sendMethodDescription.description: Description of how this invoice will be sent

invoiceOnAccountVatHigh.description: Is the on account(a konto) amounts including vat

invoiceSMSNotificationNumber.description: The phone number of the receiver of sms notifications. Must be a norwegian phone number

discountPercentage.description: Default discount percentage for order lines.

unitCostCurrency.description: Unit price purchase (cost) excluding VAT in the order's currency

unitPriceExcludingVatCurrency.description: Unit price of purchase excluding VAT in the order's currency. If only unit price Excl. VAT or unit price Inc. VAT is supplied, we will calculate and update the missing field.

unitPriceIncludingVatCurrency.description: Unit price of purchase including VAT in the order's currency. If only unit price Excl. VAT or unit price Inc. VAT is supplied, we will calculate and update the missing field.

sortIndex.description: Defines the presentation order of the lines. Does not need to be, and is often not continuous. Only applicable if parent order has orderLineSorting as CUSTOM.

isPicked.description: Only used for Logistics customers who activated the available inventory functionality. Represents whether the line has been picked up or not.

pickedDate.description: Only used for Logistics customers who activated the available inventory functionality. Represents the pick date for an order line or null if the line was not picked.

orderedQuantity.description: Only used for Logistics customers who activated the Backorder functionality. Represents the quantity that was ordered. If nothing is specified, the ordered quantity will be the same as the delivered quantity.

isCharged.description: Flag indicating whether the order line is charged or not.

invoiceNumber.description: If value is set to 0, the invoice number will be generated.

comment.description: Comment text for the specific invoice.

orders.description: Related orders. Only one order per invoice is supported at the moment.

invoiceRemarks.description: Deprecated Invoice remarks - please use the 'invoiceRemark' instead.

paymentTypeId.description: [BETA] Optional. Used to specify payment type for prepaid invoices. Payment type can be specified here, or as a parameter to the /invoice API endpoint.

paidAmount.description: [BETA] Optional. Used to specify the prepaid amount of the invoice. The paid amount can be specified here, or as a parameter to the /invoice API endpoint.

ehfSendStatus.description: [Deprecated] EHF (Peppol) send status. This only shows status for historic EHFs.

amortizationStartDate.description: Amortization start date. AmortizationAccountId, amortizationStartDate and amortizationEndDate should be provided.

quantityAmount1.description: The quantity amount associated with the posting

quantityAmount2.description: The quantity amount associated with the posting

postingRuleId.description: The payment type id associated with the posting. This ID will only be set if the payment types used is an internal payment type like 'Nettbank' - it is not set if the payment is a bank payment like AutoPay or ZTL.

perDiemCompensations.description: Link to individual per diem compensations.

travelExpenseZoneId.description: Optional travel expense zone id. If not specified, the value from field zone will be used.

overnightAccommodation.description: Set what sort of accommodation was had overnight.

activityType.description: PROJECT_SPECIFIC_ACTIVITY are made via project/projectActivity, as they must be part of a project.

lifetime.description: Lifetime in months for the asset.

isCustomer.description: Determine if the supplier is also a customer

bankAccounts.description: [DEPRECATED] List of the bank account numbers for this supplier. Norwegian bank account numbers only.

overdueNoticeEmail.description: The email address of the customer where the noticing emails are sent in case of an overdue

bankAccountPresentation.description: List of bankAccount for this supplier

ledgerType.description: Supported ledger types, default is GENERAL. Only available for customers with the module multiple ledgers.

vatLocked.description: True if all entries on this account must have the vat type given by vatType.

isCloseable.description: True if it should be possible to close entries on this account and it is possible to filter on open entries.

isApplicableForSupplierInvoice.description: True if this account is applicable for supplier invoice registration.

requireReconciliation.description: True if this account must be reconciled before the accounting period closure.

isInactive.description: Inactive accounts will not show up in UI lists.

saftCode.description: SAF-T 1.0 standard account ID for account. It will be given a default value based on account number if empty.

groupingCode.description: SAF-T 1.3 groupingCode for the account. It will be given a default value based on account number if empty.

requiresDepartment.description: Posting against this account requires department.

requiresProject.description: Posting against this account requires project.

deductionPercentage.description: Percentage of the VAT amount that is deducted. Always 100% for all predefined VAT types, but can be lower for custom types for relative VAT.
